topic: From three disconnected systems to one platform — what the first 30 days of transition look like
format: Before/after of a single workflow: same task, two completely different experiences
post:
Monday morning. Three systems open, four browser tabs, one WhatsApp group with 34 unread messages — just to process a single work permit renewal.

Thirty days later, the same task takes 4 minutes inside one dashboard.

That's what SmartPro Hub customers in Oman actually report after switching from fragmented setups. Not a projection. Real teams, real numbers.

Here's how those 30 days go:

Week 1 — data migration and staff onboarding. Most teams are live within 72 hours.

Week 2 — WPS payroll runs without a spreadsheet in sight. Ministry of Labour filings queue automatically.

Week 3 — the client portal goes live. Customers stop chasing updates over WhatsApp.

Week 4 — the ops director opens one dashboard: visa expiries, Omanization ratios, pending contracts, outstanding invoices. Everything in one place.

We built SmartPro Hub because GCC businesses have been making do with software designed for completely different markets. PRO services, Sanad office management, compliance, payroll — built for how operations here actually work. Bilingual. Starting at OMR 12/month.

One question worth sitting with: what workflow in your business still lives on WhatsApp that really shouldn't?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
